name: Phyrexia: All Will Be One

draft.notes: 10 commons + 3 uncommons + 1 rare + 1 land + ad card. If a foil appears it comes after the rare and displaces a common (becomes 9 commons). Japanese printing puts the basic land before the rare; basic lands are normal full-art or 'Phyrexianized' full-art.

statedRates: Foil 1:45 cards. Half of packs have 3 A uncommons, half have 3 B uncommons.
sourceNotes: Large set, normal size for era. Printed in USA, Japan, Belgium; US printing modeled. 36 packs per box.
skipReason: Superseded by a hand-authored recipe derived from the official Wizards 'Collecting' article (more accurate odds + full product lineup). The generator must NOT overwrite data/booster-contents/one.json.
